name: PUREX Process
description: Plutonium Uranium Redox Extraction process using solvent extraction with tributyl phosphate (TBP) for separating uranium and plutonium from spent nuclear fuel
function_alignment: Direct match - established industrial process for uranium/plutonium extraction from spent fuel
notes: Gold standard for commercial reprocessing, handles all required fuel types with established regulatory compliance

name: PUREX (Plutonium Uranium Redox Extraction) Process
description: Industry-standard aqueous reprocessing method using tributyl phosphate (TBP) in kerosene to separate uranium and plutonium from fission products through solvent extraction. Widely implemented at facilities like La Hague and Sellafield with proven multi-fuel type capability.
domain: Nuclear fuel cycle - spent fuel reprocessing
function_alignment: Direct match - established technology for uranium/plutonium extraction from spent fuel with demonstrated high-capacity processing
notes: Duplicate of first entry but with more detailed description - represents the definitive solution for requirements
gap_analysis: Perfect alignment - proven at exact scale requirement with demonstrated multi-fuel capability and regulatory compliance.

name: COEX (Co-Extraction) Process
description: Advanced reprocessing technology that co-extracts uranium and plutonium together rather than separately, designed to enhance proliferation resistance while maintaining separation efficiency. Developed by AREVA/Orano for next-generation facilities.
function_alignment: High alignment - specifically designed for proliferation-resistant fissile material recovery with multi-fuel capability
notes: Next-generation technology with proliferation resistance benefits, suitable for high-capacity operations
gap_analysis: Strong alignment - meets fissile material extraction requirements with enhanced security features for modern regulatory frameworks.

name: GANEX (Group Actinide Extraction) Process
description: Advanced partitioning process for simultaneous extraction of uranium, plutonium, and minor actinides using selective extractants. Enables comprehensive actinide recovery for advanced fuel cycles and waste minimization.
function_alignment: Moderate alignment - broader scope than required but includes target fissile material extraction with advanced separation capabilities
notes: More comprehensive than basic U/Pu extraction but less mature technology with higher complexity
